fields.title: sandbox: route worker approvals to parent ui
fields.description:
## Task

Enable approval prompts for headless in-process workers by routing approval requests to the parent session UI.

## Files

- `extensions/tau/src/sandbox/approval.ts`
- `extensions/tau/src/sandbox/index.ts`
- Add `extensions/tau/src/task/approval-broker.ts` (or `extensions/tau/src/shared/approval-broker.ts`)

## Behavior

- If a worker session has `ctx.hasUI === false` but is registered with a parent approval broker, use the broker to prompt.
- If no broker is available (or parent has no UI), deny (same as main agent headless behavior).
- Cover:
  - `on-request` escalation prompts
  - `unless-trusted` prompts for unsafe commands
  - `on-failure` retry-without-sandbox prompts
  - ASRT-unavailable "run unsandboxed?" session decision

## DoD

- Worker approval behavior matches the main agent as closely as possible, without granting more access.
- Prompts are serialized (no overlapping dialogs).
fields.close_reason: Implemented worker sandbox/approval inheritance, clamping, per-call resnapshot, approval broker routing, and vitest coverage
